meta.title: The First 2,000 Days — daily push notifications (EN + Hinglish)
meta.notes: One notification per day. contentType may carry +Vaccine/+Feeding overlays; those are time-sensitive/safety-relevant and should be prioritised in UI. Vaccine/feeding exact timing still lives in the schedule data files.

notifications.en: Day 1: hello world! Reflexes are online, vision is set to 'face distance.'  | [Vaccine] Little pinch today, big protection ahead — BCG, Hepatitis B - dose 1, OPV - dose 0 due. Loop in your pediatrician.
notifications.hinglish: Ek baat batayein? Din 1: hello world! Reflexes are online, vision is set to 'face distance.' Bas maza lo aaj ka din! | [Vaccine] Aaj thoda 'aaah' wala pal aayega — BCG, Hepatitis B - dose 1, OPV - dose 0 due hai. Pediatrician se baat kar lo.

notifications.en: Day 2: first poops, first weight dip — both totally on schedule. 
notifications.hinglish: Zara dhyaan se, Din 2: first poops, first weight dip — both totally on schedule. Bas maza lo aaj ka din!

notifications.en: Day 3: milk's arriving — expect a hungrier, busier baby today. You've got this, superstar.
notifications.hinglish: Aaj ka scene: Din 3: milk's arriving — expect a hungrier, busier baby today. Aap sach mein great kar rahe ho.

notifications.en: Day 4: baby's eyes are starting to follow you, just for a beat. You've got this, superstar.
notifications.hinglish: Chhota sa update: Din 4: baby's eyes are starting to follow you, just for a beat. Aap sach mein great kar rahe ho.

notifications.en: Day 5: peeling skin, drying cord — normal newborn housekeeping. You've got this, superstar.

notifications.en: Day 6: that flicker of a smile? Still reflex, not "hi Mom" yet. Go on, brag a little.

notifications.en: Day 7: one week in. Sleep is chaotic; that's the design, not a problem. Go on, brag a little.

notifications.en: Day 8: baby's world is black, white, and blurry-beautiful. Go on, brag a little.

notifications.en: Day 10: the weight-regain race is nearly won. Cue tiny fanfare.
